headline: Is Becton, Dickinson and Company (BDX) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is BDX a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Becton, Dickinson and Company on The Mispricing Desk’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on BDX. Becton, Dickinson and Company’s share was trading at $149.99 as of June 8th. BDX’s trailing and forward P/E were 26.38 and 11.21 respectively […]
